overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk at night in a futuristic city. The character follows a pedestrian past graffiti-covered walls and neon-lit billboards before turning into a covered underpass beneath an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk next to elevated highway with graffiti walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall black pole with bright rectangular LED light fixture
yellow-orange metal barriers separating sidewalk from the multi-lane road
massive concrete overpass and highway ramp structure overhead
large illuminated advertising screens on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-slicked concrete sidewalk at night beside a graffiti-covered wall. Orange barriers separate the walkway from the multi-lane road where sparse traffic passes beneath street lamps. The elevated highway structure looms overhead while digital billboards glow in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk approaching intersection with neon-lit skyline

events.description: increased exposure to bright neon signs and city lights from the skyline ahead

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a white crop top and green pants as the city skyline becomes visible

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing white top and green pants with distinctive pink shoes

entered.detail: illuminated street sign with arrow indicating direction to Pacifica district
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk as the environment opens up to reveal the neon-lit city skyline. The camera follows a pedestrian in distinctive white and green clothing. A street sign for 'Pacifica' becomes visible overhead as the graffiti wall recedes behind and the barriers move further to the right.

events.description: turns left off the main sidewalk into a covered walkway beneath the overpass
makes a sharp left turn to enter the underpass area away from the main road

agents.ego_description: turning left to enter the covered underpass while maintaining visual contact with the pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: continuing forward into the underpass depths ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overpass structure
metal safety railings along the left edge of the walkway
dark concrete underside of the elevated highway creating a ceiling

segments.scene_description: Turning left into a semi-covered walkway beneath the elevated highway. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed with massive concrete pillars lining the left side. The pedestrian ahead continues into the underpass as the open street, traffic barriers, and city skyline disappear from view behind concrete walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep underpass corridor with structural columns

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass corridor following the distant pedestrian

notable_agents.action: walking away into the depths of the underpass toward the distant light

entered.detail: faint colorful glow from neon signs visible at the far end of the underpass tunnel

segments.scene_description: Proceeding deeper into the enclosed underpass where artificial lighting is minimal and the space feels narrow and tunnel-like. The corridor is flanked by concrete support pillars on both sides with metal railings along the left edge. Only distant neon lights are visible at the far end as the pedestrian ahead continues walking into the shadowy depths.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked city sidewalk that gradually transitions into a dark, enclosed concrete underpass. It begins beside a graffiti-covered wall and orange traffic barriers, moving under the loom of an elevated highway while digital billboards glow in the distance. As the camera follows a pedestrian in white and green clothing, the environment opens up to reveal a neon-lit skyline and a street sign for Pacifica. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left, leaving the open street and city lights behind to enter a semi-covered walkway flanked by massive concrete pillars. Finally, the space narrows into a tunnel-like corridor with minimal artificial lighting and metal railings, following the pedestrian deeper into the shadowy depths of the underpass.
